title: ネイチャさんとお疲れトレーナー

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: It's been a busy few days, but it's finally over...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Deciding to treat myself, I drag my tired body to
the shopping district.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Hey there, Trainer! Wait up!
choice_data_list: Nature?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
I knew you were busy, but I didn't expect you to
push yourself this hard.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
I can't stand seeing you like this, so here, let me
treat you.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
The shop's not open yet, so there aren't any
customers. Why don't you wait in the karaoke
section in the back?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Nice Nature brings me to the corner of a bar.
choice_data_list: Where are we?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
I know the lady who owns this place. She said we
could use this space after I explained the
situation.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
I'll go make something simple... I can't guarantee
it'll be good, though.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A few minutes later, Nice Nature comes back with
some fried rice.
choice_data_list: All of this, for me?
All of this, for me?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: She said I should feed you as much as you need.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Go ahead and start eating before it gets cold.
choice_data_list: Whoa! You could totally open a restaurant!
Whoa! You could totally open a restaurant!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The fried rice not only looks professionally
prepared, but it tastes like it too! I can't stop
eating.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
You're so dramatic. It's just something I picked up
from when I used to help my mo—

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Holy cow! You've already finished?
choice_data_list: It was just that good.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
No need for flattery. You must've been starving.
Here, give me the plate.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I watch her as she leaves.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Maybe it's because I just ate so much, but I start
to drift off...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: La... la la... ♪

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: ...La la la... ♪

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Oh? Did I wake you up?
choice_data_list: What were you singing?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
It's a song my mom used to sing at the counter. I
don't really know much beyond the melody
though.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
I was thinking about those times and just started
singing... Sorry.
choice_data_list: Actually, I wanted to hear more.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
You and your flattery again. It's not necessary,
you know.
choice_data_list: I really do like your singing.
If you sing like that at concerts, it'll be perfect!
If you sing like that at concerts, it'll be perfect!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
You and your flattery again. It's not necessary,
you know.
choice_data_list: I really do like your singing.
If you sing like that at concerts, it'll be perfect!
If you sing like that at concerts, it'll be perfect!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: O-okay, if you say so. You really are strange...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
But I'm relieved that you said you liked it, instead
of saying my singing is "good."

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
That kind of pressure really gets to me, you
know? It makes it all the worse when I end up not
living up to such praise.
choice_data_list: Nature...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Haha, sorry for getting serious.
choice_data_list:
I like it when you share your serious thoughts
too.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: What... You're crazy...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
You keep saying things like that, and it'll lose its
meaning.

text_block_list.name: Bar Owner
text_block_list.text: Are you all done, Natie?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Thanks for letting us use the bar. It was a huge
help.

text_block_list.name: Bar Owner
text_block_list.text:
You must be the trainer Natie's been talking
about. She's told me so much ab—

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Oookay! That's enough! Let's go, Trainer!
choice_data_list: So you've been talking about me?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: We're. Done. Here!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: The owner watches us warmly as we take off.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Wow... You're still thinking about winning
concerts even after working so much?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
This has been on my mind for a while now, but...
aren't you pushing yourself a little too hard?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
I feel like you'll burn out if I don't keep my eye on
you.
choice_data_list: That won't happen.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: I beg to differ.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: One sec. I'll go make you a rice ball for later.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
You're just going to continue working when you
get home, right?
choice_data_list: You know me too well.
You know me too well.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Hey! At least pretend like you won't!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I leave the bar with a loving lecture and a
late-night snack from Nice Nature.
